name: Spaghetti Factory Mizithra Cheese Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over medium heat, melt the butter.
2. Add olive oil and cook for 30 seconds until foamy.
3. Gradually whisk in flour, stirring constantly until smooth roux forms.
4. Stir in garlic and cook for an additional minute.
5. Slowly pour in milk and half-and-half while continuously whisking to avoid lumps.
6. Season with white pepper and chopped parsley.
7. Reduce heat to low and stir in Romano cheese until melted and smooth.
8. Toss the sauce over hot cooked pasta and serve.
